title: TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key Out for MBA & MCA

detail.title: TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key Out for MBA & MCA
detail.short_info: Anna University has released the TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key for MBA and MCA exams at tancet.annauniv.edu. Check download steps, result date, score calculation process and counselling updates here.

sections.heading: TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key Out for MBA & MCA

content.text: The TANCET 2026 final answer key for MBA and MCA has been released online at the official Anna University TANCET portal, allowing candidates to download the revised, error‑free key and estimate their final scores. Candidates who appeared for TANCET 2026 can log in with their registered email ID and password to view and download the final answer key from tancet.annauniv.edu. The final key reflects all changes made after the provisional answer key challenge window and will now be used for preparing the TANCET 2026 result and percentile scores.

sections.heading: TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key - Overview

rows: MBA and MCA (CEETA‑PG is notified separately)

sections.heading: Direct Link to Download TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key

content.text: Anna University has activated the final answer key link on the official TANCET website, and candidates can access it only through the exam portal. After logging in, candidates will find separate options to view or download the TANCET 2026 MBA final answer key and the TANCET 2026 MCA final answer key from their dashboard. It is strongly recommended that you use only the official link on tancet.annauniv.edu and avoid any third‑party login pages.
How to Download TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key (MBA & MCA)
Downloading the TANCET final answer key is a simple online process that can be completed in a few steps.

items: Visit the official TANCET website: tancet.annauniv.edu.
Click on the TANCET 2026 link or the “Answer Key / Response Sheet” section on the homepage.
Select your programme - MBA or MCA.
Enter your registered email ID and password in the login window.
Complete the captcha verification and click on “Login”.
Click on the TANCET 2026 final answer key link visible on your dashboard.
Download the answer key PDF and save it for future reference.

content.text: The same login credentials are generally used later for checking results and downloading scorecards, so candidates should keep these details safe.
Direct Link to Download TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key Here

sections.heading: TANCET 2026 MBA Final Answer Key - What It Contains

content.text: The TANCET 2026 MBA final answer key carries the officially verified correct answers for all questions asked in the MBA paper. Candidates can match the question numbers in the key with their question booklet and OMR or online response sheet to verify how many questions they have answered correctly. By applying the official marking scheme, MBA aspirants can arrive at a fairly accurate estimate of their raw TANCET 2026 score before the result is announced.

sections.heading: TANCET 2026 MCA Final Answer Key - What It Contains

content.text: The final answer key for TANCET 2026 MCA provides question‑wise correct responses for all sections of the MCA question paper. MCA candidates can use this key to cross‑check each of their responses, identify mistakes, and calculate their expected marks. This helps them understand where they performed well and where they lost marks, which is useful not only for the current admission cycle but also for those planning to re‑attempt in future years.

sections.heading: How to Calculate Marks Using TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key

content.text: To calculate your expected marks, you need the final answer key, your question paper or response sheet, and the official marking scheme.

items: First, go through each question and mark the ones where your answer matches the final answer key as correct and the rest as incorrect.

Using the TANCET exam pattern, multiply the number of correct responses by the marks allotted per correct answer and then subtract negative marks, if any, for each wrong response as per official rules.
The total after applying positive and negative marks will give you your approximate raw TANCET 2026 score, while the official percentile and rank will be shared later on the result portal.

content.text: Always rely on the official brochure or latest notification for the exact marking scheme instead of guessing.

sections.heading: TANCET 2026 Result Date, Scorecard and Percentile

content.text: With the final answer key now released, the next major milestone is the TANCET 2026 result announcement. As per current information, Anna University is expected to declare TANCET 2026 results around May 23, 2026, on the official website. Candidates will have to log in using their registered email ID and password to download their scorecard, which typically mentions the candidate’s personal details, programme, test number, raw marks and percentile score.

Percentile scores are used by participating institutes and authorities during counselling and admission to MBA and MCA programmes in Tamil Nadu. Candidates are advised to download and securely store multiple copies of their TANCET scorecard as it may be required at several stages of the admission process.

sections.heading: TANCET 2026 Counselling and Next Steps After Final Answer Key

content.text: Once the TANCET 2026 results are released, eligible candidates can participate in the centralised counselling process for MBA and MCA seats in Tamil Nadu. The counselling is conducted as per official guidelines, and candidates are allotted seats based on their TANCET percentile, reservation norms, and choices filled during the counselling rounds.

Candidates should keep the following ready in advance: TANCET 2026 scorecard, admit card, academic certificates, community certificate (if applicable), and other documents listed in the counselling brochure. Detailed counselling dates, registration process, and fee payment instructions are usually published shortly after the result declaration, so monitoring the official website regularly is important.

sections.heading: TANCET 2026 Eligibility (Quick Recap for MBA & MCA)

content.text: Although the final answer key is mainly relevant for those who have already taken the exam, many candidates simultaneously research eligibility for upcoming sessions. In general, TANCET eligibility includes basic nationality and educational qualification requirements that candidates must satisfy as per the official brochure.

For MBA, candidates typically need a recognised bachelor’s degree with a minimum prescribed percentage or equivalent CGPA, as specified in the notification. For MCA, candidates usually require a bachelor’s degree with mathematics or statistics at the 10+2 or graduation level, along with other conditions detailed by Anna University. Since eligibility norms are subject to change, aspirants should refer only to the latest TANCET information brochure or official website for the final rules.

sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates Checking TANCET 2026 Final Answer Key

content.text: When accessing the TANCET 2026 final answer key, candidates should follow a few important precautions. Always ensure that the URL in your browser is the official tancet.annauniv.edu domain before entering login credentials. Avoid downloading the answer key from unofficial websites or social media links that ask for personal information.

Treat the final answer key as a tool for self‑assessment only; your admission will be based on the official result, percentile, and counselling process conducted by Anna University and other authorities. Keep a copy of your question paper, response sheet, and final answer key safely stored until the completion of the entire admission cycle for future reference.
